title: Tasha Tudor: A Still Water Story
original_title: ターシャ・テューダー 静かな水の物語
overview: A naturalist and bestselling writer of children's books, Tasha Tudor illustrated several books such as The Secret Garden and A Little Princess as well as Christmas cards for the White House. She cultivated a magnificent garden on her vast property and lived the life of her dreams.
